## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.56

### Camera WebRTC
- Fixes a WebRTC signal read-loop cleanup error that could appear immediately after the camera returned its SDP answer.
- Keeps the native Home Assistant WebRTC signaling session ready to receive browser ICE candidates after the SDP answer is sent.

### Debug Logging
- Adds compact diagnostics for Home Assistant ICE candidates received by the camera entity.
- Adds compact diagnostics when Home Assistant requests a WebRTC session close.
- Keeps SDP, ICE candidates, ticket signatures, tokens, and full serial numbers out of debug logs.
